name: Okta Possible DoS Attack Signals (1 hour)
description: Detects concentrated Okta rate-limit warning/violation events that may indicate denial-of-service activity.
query: SELECT COALESCE(l.actor_id, l.actor_type, 'unknown') AS id, COALESCE(actor.login, actor.email, l.actor_id, l.actor_type, 'unknown') AS principal, COUNT(*) AS rate_limit_events, MAX(l.published) AS last_event FROM okta_system_logs l LEFT JOIN okta_users actor ON actor.id = l.actor_id WHERE LOWER(COALESCE(l.event_type, '')) IN ('application.integration.rate_limit_exceeded', 'system.org.rate_limit.warning', 'system.org.rate_limit.violation', 'core.concurrency.org.limit.violation') AND l.published >= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() - INTERVAL '1 hour' GROUP BY COALESCE(l.actor_id, l.actor_type, 'unknown'), COALESCE(actor.login, actor.email, l.actor_id, l.actor_type, 'unknown') HAVING COUNT(*) >= 10
remediation: Investigate high-volume rate-limit events for abusive automation or service disruption attempts and apply throttling, source controls, and incident response as needed.
